item.title: Deployment pipeline
item.intent: The site must have a working deployment pipeline — push to main triggers build and deploy to a CDN — so publishing is a git push, not a manual process. Cloudflare Pages is the target platform.
item.description: Set up Cloudflare Pages deployment. Create a wrangler.toml or configure via the Cloudflare dashboard. Add a GitHub Actions workflow that builds and deploys on push to main. Set environment variables for PostHog.
steps: Create wrangler.toml with project name, build command (npm run build), and output directory (dist/)
Create .github/workflows/deploy.yml — triggered on push to main, runs npm ci && npm run build, deploys to Cloudflare Pages
Configure environment variables: PUBLIC_POSTHOG_KEY and PUBLIC_POSTHOG_HOST as GitHub secrets referenced in workflow
Add the Astro Cloudflare adapter if needed, or confirm static output works with Pages (it does)
Set site URL in astro.config.mjs to https://simonplant.com

acceptanceCriteria.text: Deployment workflow exists and references build command
Workflow triggers on push to main
